comprehend.flywheel.taskconfig.CfnAbout: Configuration about the model associated with a flywheel.

comprehend.flywheel.taskconfig.DocumentC.Description: Configuration required for a document classification model.

comprehend.flywheel.taskconfig.EntityRec.Description: Configuration required for an entity recognition model.

comprehend.flywheel.taskconfig.LanguageC.Description: Language code for the language that the model supports.
comprehend.flywheel.taskconfig.LanguageC.Allowed values: ar | de | en | es | fr | hi | it | ja | ko | pt | zh | zh-TW
